summary: Average‑quality recording with decent sound; set highlights feature a strong Playing in the Band → Uncle John's Band transition and a nicely played Brokedown Palace.
review: The reviewer finds this 1994 show to be neither great nor terrible, noting solid playing throughout but few standout moments. The second set shines thanks to a flowing PITB>UJB sequence and a nice rendition of Brokedown Palace, while the first set is competent without major highlights. No specific recording‑quality comments are given, so the audio appears serviceable but unremarkable.

ai_rating.rationale: One detailed review gives a 3‑star rating and describes an average performance with a few highlights; lack of recording details limits confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No explicit comments on sound source or clarity; reviewer only says the show is "not great, but not terrible," implying a passable but unremarkable recording.

standout_songs: Playing in the Band > Uncle John's Band
show_quality.setlist_flow: First set is consistently played but lacks major highlights; second set stands out with a smooth PITB>UJB segue and a nicely rendered Brokedown Palace.
